text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, I see a large pile of cardboard
boxes in front of the school dormitories.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Most likely they were supposed to be delivered
to the academy, but wound up here instead.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaaagh! I've never seen so much stuff before!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: My arms are itching to pick it all up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without a moment's hesitation, Winning Ticket
tries to lift one of the boxes.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Stop right there, Ticket. Are you seriously going
to carry all of those?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! This'll be a cinch for us! Piece of carrot
cake!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Uh... no way. I just did some quick calculations
and there's no way we'll be able to make it by the
first bell.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so there's a time limit to this race, huh? That
makes it even better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket grabs a box and runs off.
Moments later...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Done! Okay, next round! Staaart!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh? She's 5.8 seconds faster than I predicted. Are
you going to break your limit, Ticket?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You bet! I'm gonna be even faster this time!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...Curious. I shall see if I, too, can surpass my
limit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only Biwa Hayahide, but a steady stream of
other students begin taking boxes as well.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah! You'll never beat meeeee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A crowd runs back and forth between the
dormitories and the academy. Within minutes, the
number of boxes dwindles.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Here comes the last ooone!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That was a great morning workout! I'm not sure
who got first, though!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
One thing's for sure—it seems like we all broke
through our limits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to everyone's efforts, the problem is
resolved quickly.
